ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "app" TEXT /* Name of the application or framework used */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository owner */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last updated */,
  "pushed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the repository was last pushed to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository */,
  "stargazers" INTEGER /* Number of stargazers (users who starred the repository) */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers (users who watch the repository) */,
  "is_fork" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is a fork of another repository */,
  "forks_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the repository */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers (users who watch the repository) */,
  "has_downloads" INTEGER /* Whether the repository has downloads enabled */,
  "has_issues" INTEGER /* Whether the repository has issues enabled */,
  "has_pages" INTEGER /* Whether the repository has pages enabled */,
  "has_wiki" INTEGER /* Whether the repository has a wiki */,
  "has_projects" INTEGER /* Whether the repository has projects enabled */,
  "git_url" TEXT /* Git URL of the repository */,
  "clone_url" TEXT /* Clone URL of the repository */,
  "last_commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the last commit */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last commit */,
  "last_commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the last commit */,
  "last_commit_author" TEXT /* Author of the last commit */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics or tags associated with the repository */,
  "readme" TEXT /* README content of the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the repository */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository on GitHub */,
  "archived" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is archived */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is private */,
  "fork_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* Number of stargazers */,
  "watch_count" INTEGER /* Number of watchers */,
  "last_pushed_by" TEXT /* Username of the last person who pushed to the repository */,
  "last_pushed_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last push */,
  "last_issue_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last issue */,
  "last_pull_request_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the contributor contributed to */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "github_profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the contributor's GitHub profile */,
  "contributions_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the contributor's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL of the commit on GitHub */,
  "commit_files" TEXT /* Files changed in the commit */,
  "commit_diff" TEXT /* Diff of the commit */,
  "commit_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_body" TEXT /* Body of the issue */,
  "issue_state" TEXT /* State of the issue (open or closed) */,
  "issue_assignee" TEXT /* Assignee of the issue */,
  "issue_labels" TEXT /* Labels of the issue */,
  "issue_url" TEXT /* URL of the issue on GitHub */,
  "issue_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  "issue_reactions" TEXT /* Reactions on the issue */,
  "issue_milestone" TEXT /* Milestone of the issue */,
  "issue_closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was closed */,
  "issue_author_association" TEXT /* Author association (e.g., OWNER, CONTRIBUTOR, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request belongs to */,
  "pull_request_title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "pull_request_body" TEXT /* Body of the pull request */,
  "pull_request_state" TEXT /* State of the pull request (open or closed) */,
  "pull_request_assignee" TEXT /* Assignee of the pull request */,
  "pull_request_labels" TEXT /* Labels of the pull request */,
  "pull_request_url" TEXT /* URL of the pull request on GitHub */,
  "pull_request_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the pull request */,
  "pull_request_reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews on the pull request */,
  "pull_request_reactions" TEXT /* Reactions on the pull request */,
  "pull_request_merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was merged */,
  "pull_request_author_association" TEXT /* Author association (e.g., OWNER, CONTRIBUTOR, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_contributors" (
  "repo_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository-contributor pair */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contributor_role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the repository (e.g. owner, collaborator, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributors_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_contributors_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_issues" (
  "repo_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository-issue pair */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "issue_state" TEXT /* State of the issue in the repository (e.g. open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_pull_requests" (
  "repo_pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository-pull request pair */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "pull_request_state" TEXT /* State of the pull request in the repository (e.g. open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_pull_requests_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "github_id" TEXT /* GitHub ID of the user */,
  "github_access_token" TEXT /* GitHub OAuth access token */,
  "github_refresh_token" TEXT /* GitHub OAuth refresh token */,
  "github_expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access token */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., ADMIN, USER, etc.) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "user_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g. commit, issue, pull request) */,
  "contribution_url" TEXT /* URL of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the contribution */,
  "contribution_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
